creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: tcberner
Date: Sun Dec 16 15:25:42 UTC 2018
New revision: 487597
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/487597

Log:
  Update PyQt5 to 5.11.3

  - sip         upgrade to 4.19.13
  - qscintilla2 upgrade to 2.10.8
  - PyQt5       upgrade to 5.11.3

  This has been worked on by arrowd and myself.

  PR:		233954
  Exp-run by:	antoine
